{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe creating registry entries under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections, which can be used to modify proxy settings or network configuration. This is a common tactic for malware to redirect traffic or establish persistence.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "Internet Settings",
    "Connections",
    "dpapi.dll"
  ]
